mapper.sql: id, test_id, part_number, group_number, title, instruction_text, group_guide_text, group_requirement_text, question_no_start, question_no_end, display_order, time_limit_seconds, is_deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reading_part_group ( test_id, part_number, group_number, title, instruction_text, group_guide_text, group_requirement_text, question_no_start, question_no_end, display_order, time_limit_seconds, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{testId}, #{partNumber}, #{groupNumber}, #{title}, #{instructionText}, #{groupGuideText}, #{groupRequirementText}, #{questionNoStart}, #{questionNoEnd}, #{displayOrder}, #{timeLimitSeconds}, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM reading_part_group WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM reading_part_group WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM reading_part_group WHERE test_id = #{testId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY display_order ASC, part_number ASC, group_number ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM reading_part_group WHERE test_id = #{testId} ORDER BY display_order ASC, part_number ASC, group_number ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE reading_part_group SET part_number = #{partNumber}, group_number = #{groupNumber}, title = #{title}, instruction_text = #{instructionText}, group_guide_text = #{groupGuideText}, group_requirement_text = #{groupRequirementText}, question_no_start = #{questionNoStart}, question_no_end = #{questionNoEnd}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, time_limit_seconds = #{timeLimitSeconds} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reading_part_group SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE reading_part_group SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE test_id = #{testId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE reading_part_group SET is_deleted = 0 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 1
UPDATE reading_part_group SET is_deleted = 0 WHERE test_id = #{testId} AND is_deleted = 1
